title: Rogue (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:RoguePilot-tPoV.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A Rogue Squadron pilot]]
'''Rogue''' could refer to the following:

{{IncompleteList}}

*''[[Rogue]]'', a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] group.
*[[Rogue-class Porax-38 starfighter|''Rogue''-class Porax-38 starfighter]]
*[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]
**[[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]]
*''[[Rogue Shadow]]'', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stealth shuttle.
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'', a book by [[Greg Bear]].

{{Disambig}}
